column1: SEC-PAYMENT-NO-BROWSER-ROUTE|Prove Payment Service is internal-only and not reachable from browser ingress|sh tests/security/verify-order-payment-security-live.sh SEC-PAYMENT-NO-BROWSER-ROUTE|browser/API gateway requests to /internal/payments/authorize deny or 404 before payment code runs|Do not expose /internal/payments/** through APISIX browser routes; keep payment-service on the internal Compose network only

SEC-PAYMENT-WRONG-CLIENT|Reject service tokens that are not from order-service|sh tests/security/verify-order-payment-security-live.sh SEC-PAYMENT-WRONG-CLIENT|Payment Service rejects a payment-service-audience token when azp/client_id is not order-service|Validate aud=payment-service and azp/client_id=order-service explicitly in payment-service before domain work

SEC-PAYMENT-REJECTS-USER-TOKEN|Reject user/browser commerce-api tokens at Payment Service|sh tests/security/verify-order-payment-security-live.sh SEC-PAYMENT-REJECTS-USER-TOKEN|Payment Service rejects a user token with aud=commerce-api even if it has commerce scopes|Use a separate payment-service audience and client-credentials validator; never accept BFF-injected user tokens on internal payment routes

SEC-CHECKOUT-IDEMPOTENT-REPLAY|Prevent duplicate payment authorization for repeated checkout requests|sh tests/security/verify-order-payment-security-live.sh SEC-CHECKOUT-IDEMPOTENT-REPLAY|same idempotency key plus same body returns the same order and calls Payment Service once|Claim and persist the idempotency key/body before calling payment; return the stored order for exact replay

SEC-CHECKOUT-IDEMPOTENCY-COLLISION|Reject idempotency-key reuse with a different checkout body before payment|sh tests/security/verify-order-payment-security-live.sh SEC-CHECKOUT-IDEMPOTENCY-COLLISION|same idempotency key plus different body rejects and Payment Service is not called|Compare a stable request-body fingerprint against the claimed key before payment and fail closed on mismatch
